properties.titulo_evento: US munitions depleted by Iran war will take years to restore, analysis finds
properties.descricao: Replenishing stockpiles of critical weapons systems could take until 2030 or 2031, creating a "window of vulnerability," a new analysis found.

properties.descricao: US president says Iran can't 'out-wait' him, suggesting that Washington is not satisfied with Tehran's offers for deal.

properties.descricao: Palestinians across Gaza marked Eid al-Adha prayers amongst rubble and destruction as Israeli attacks continued.

properties.descricao: The military says areas south of the Zahrani River are now "combat zones" as it threatens Hezbollah with fresh strikes.

properties.descricao: The attacks took place while Iranian and Qatari negotiators were in Doha for peace talks.

properties.descricao: GCHQ's director Anne Keast-Butler set out the threats facing the UK in her inaugural public speech.

properties.titulo_evento: Can EU find a Russia whisperer to mediate an end to war in Ukraine?
properties.descricao: With the US pulling out of trilateral talks with Russia and Ukraine, the EU is looking for potential candidates to step in.

properties.titulo_evento: 'More than 100,000 people live in this city': Israel urges Tyre residents to leave homes
properties.descricao: FRANCE 24 correspondent Renée Davis reports from Beirut on the Israeli military's call for the population of Tyre in southern Lebanon to leave their homes ahead of a fresh wave of air strikes.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war: Trump says US will 'watch over' Strait of Hormuz
properties.descricao: US President Donald Trump said the vital Strait of Hormuz "must be open to everyone" and "no one can control it." He made a threat to Oman, which is negotiating with Iran to control the vital waterway. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany: No recovery in sight for the economy
properties.descricao: The war in Iran has dashed hopes for economic growth. Germany's pension and healthcare systems are also feeling the strain.

properties.titulo_evento: EU enlargement: Is the bloc ready to welcome new members?
properties.descricao: Brussels says the EU must grow, but resistance within the bloc remains strong, with some arguing that it must reform before enlarging. Montenegro remains the only country with a realistic chance of joining soon.

properties.titulo_evento: India's drug lifeline to Africa disrupted by Iran war
properties.descricao: The fragile logistics corridor via Gulf states that connects African patients with critical Indian pharmaceuticals has been thrown into disarray with the Strait of Hormuz closed.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany hopes for heat pump boom amid Iran war
properties.descricao: The war in the Middle East is threatening fossil fuel supplies and leading fuel and gas prices to rise in Germany. Could that drive a surge in demand for heat pumps?

properties.titulo_evento: Spain: Police raid HQ of ruling PSOE Socialist party in graft probe
properties.descricao: Police have searched the headquarters of Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez's PSOE party investigating possible illegal payments. Sanchez meanwhile said he was still standing by former PM Jose Luis Rodriguez Zapatero.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany news: Economy minister eyes resources in China visit
properties.descricao: Germany's economy minister is in China and has called for the two countries to become more trusting partners. Meanwhile, a former chancellor has warned against any cooperation with the far-right AfD. DW has the latest.

properties.titulo_evento: How did Berlin's Jewish Hospital and hundreds of its patients survive the Holocaust?
properties.descricao: When Red Army troops entered Berlin's Jewish Hospital in 1945, they were astonished to discover hundreds of Jews living just a couple of miles away from Hitler's bunker.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine: EU, Germany summon Russian envoys after Moscow tells diplomats to leave Kyiv
properties.descricao: The EU and Germany both summoned Russian diplomats to protest attacks on Kyiv and orders for diplomats to leave the city. The UN secretary-general also rebuked Russia in a session on proliferating conflicts worldwide.

properties.descricao: The conflict comes as Dutch naval deployments in the Indo-Pacific become increasingly visible.
